name: Light Chicken Quiche
recipeIngredient: 6 ounces cooked, cubed white chicken meat
1 cup asparagus or other chopped vegetables
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Lightly spray a 9-inch pie pan with vegetable oil cooking spray (butter flavored).
3. Combine the non-fat paramesan cheese and paprika in a bowl; set aside.
4. Stack and cut phyllo dough sheets in half.
5. Place one sheet of phyllo in the pie pan and lightly spray with vegetable oil cooking spray, then sprinkle with 1 teaspoon of the cheese mixture.
6. Layer remaining phyllo sheets and sprinkle each with the same amount of cheese mixture.
7. In a bowl, combine egg whites, egg beaters, ricotta, flour, and milk. Stir in chicken, swiss cheese, vegetables, and green onion.
8. Pour the filling into the prepared pie crust.
9. Sprinkle with freshly grated parmesan.
10. Bake for 30 minutes or until lightly browned. Cool for 10 minutes.
